title: calopsis incurvata
intro: Calopsis incurvata is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the "Cape fig-marigold." The plant is native to South Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Calopsis incurvata include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Calopsis incurvata include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
